issues.title: Device Request - _TZE200_xlppj4f5- TS0601 - Immax Neo smart water timer
Device Request - Aubess Tuya 1-gang ZigBee 3.0 Mini Smart Switch - _TZ3000_fdxihpp7 / TS0001

prs.title: Fix HOBEIAN 10G radar sensor: IAS motion conflict, battery read, DP corrections
feat: Add support for Bseed 1-Gang Switch with physical button detection
Added separate driver for Tuya/Bseed touch dimmer
fixes #1059, RGB LED Strip Controller, _TZ3210_eejm8dcr / TS0505B
Added support for GIRIER Contact Sensor & Benexmart 12V RGBCW Dimmable Spotlight
Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"
Addition of Garage Door Controller and combined Fan on/off, fan speed, Light on/off drivers.

aiSummary:
### GitHub Activity Summary for Universal Tuya Zigbee

#### New Device Requests
1. **Immax Neo Smart Water Timer**
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE200_xlppj4f5`
   - **User**: Domingoso
   - **Issue**: [#135](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/135)
   - **Existing Fingerprints**:
     - `_TZE200_xlppj4f5` - Supported by `climate_sensor`
     - Other relevant fingerprints include various curtain motors and climate sensors.

2. **Aubess Tuya 1-gang ZigBee 3.0 Mini Smart Switch**
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_fdxihpp7`
   - **User**: erlandjack
   - **Issue**: [#963](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/963)
   - **Existing Fingerprints**:
     - `_TZ3000_fdxihpp7` - Supported by `climate_sensor`, `plug_energy_monitor`, and multiple switch drivers.

#### Supported Fingerprints
- **Existing Fingerprints**:
  - `_TZE200_xlppj4f5` - climate_sensor
  - `_TZ3210_0jxeoadc` - contact_sensor, valve_irrigation
  - `_TZE200_5zbp6j0u` - curtain_motor
  - `_TZE200_nkoabg8w` - curtain_motor, curtain_motor_tilt
  - `_TZE200_xuzcvlku` - curtain_motor, curtain_motor_tilt
  - `_TZE200_4vobcgd3` - climate_sensor, curtain_motor
  - `_TZE200_nogaemzt` - climate_sensor, curtain_motor, curtain_motor_tilt
  - `_TZE200_r0jdjrvi` - curtain_motor, curtain_motor_tilt
  - `_TZE200_pk0sfzvr` - climate_sensor, curtain_motor
  - `_TZE200_fdtjuw7u` - curtain_motor
  - `_TZE200_zpzndjez` - curtain_motor, curtain_motor_tilt
  - `_TZE200_wmcdj3aq` - curtain_motor, curtain_motor_tilt, shutter_roller_controller
  - `_TZ3000_fdxihpp7` - climate_sensor, plug_energy_monitor, switch drivers

#### Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the recent activity.

#### Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **Fix HOBEIAN 10G Radar Sensor**
   - **PR**: [#125](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/125)
   - **User**: michelhelsdingen
   - **Status**: Closed (not merged)

2. **Support for _TZ3000_ysdv91bk**
   - **PR**: [#118](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/118)
   - **User**: packetninja
   - **Status**: Closed (not merged)

3. **Bseed 1-Gang Switch with Physical Button Detection**
   - **PR**: [#116](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/116)
   - **User**: packetninja
   - **Status**: Closed (not merged)

4. **Separate Driver for Tuya/Bseed Touch Dimmer**
   - **PR**: [#111](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/111)
   - **User**: packetninja
   - **Status**: Merged

5. **Added _TZE204_n9ctkb6j, Lower/Upper Case ID**
   - **PR**: [#106](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/106)
   - **User**: packetninja
   - **Status**: Merged

6. **Make Fingerbot Work**
   - **PR**: [#1065](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1065)
   - **User**: slicke
   - **Status**: Open

7. **Fixes for RGB LED Strip Controller**
   - **PR**: [#1075](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1075)
   - **User**: mech78
   - **Status**: Open

8. **Support for Various New Devices**
   - Multiple open PRs for new devices, including PIR sensors and smart plugs.

This summary highlights the ongoing development and requests within the Universal Tuya Zigbee community, emphasizing the need for integration and support for new devices.
